data.description:
## Goal
Ensure live focused prerequisite finder responses are normalized from the structured payload even when the runner adds standard metadata fields.

## Implementation
- Add a RED contract test using a production-shaped response with records plus runner/model/trace/_usage metadata.
- Normalize only the registered records payload while continuing to reject malformed, missing, duplicate, unknown, or cross-attributed records.

## Verification
Run the focused prerequisite unit suite and the live singleton prerequisite packing evaluation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A valid production-shaped focused response with standard runner metadata yields its finding/consistent records rather than output-invalid.
- [ ] Unknown fields inside the records payload remain rejected fail-closed.
- [ ] Existing malformed-output and attribution tests remain green.
data.title: Accept runner metadata on focused prerequisite output
